instruction: Reply to Pastor Lila Gomez at New Hope Church about the youth mentoring signup table. Tell her I can cover the 10:00 to 12:00 slot, ask her to send the volunteer roster and the latest flyer text, and let her know I'll bring the name badges from last season.

rule_ref.rule_text: For church, outreach, fundraiser, or mentoring messages, she prefers drafting first rather than sending immediately.
rule_ref.canonical_answer: For community messages, I like to see the wording in a draft before anything goes out.

attributes.subject: Youth mentoring signup table help
attributes.body: Hi Romisha, we're setting up the signup table for the youth mentoring program in the church lobby and I hoped you might be able to cover one of the late-morning shifts. If you're open to it, I can send over the volunteer roster and the latest flyer copy so everything matches. We still have the name badges from last season if that makes things easier.

attributes.subject: Food pantry volunteer count
attributes.body: Hello Romisha, could you let me know whether you'll be at the pantry intake table this month? I'm finalizing the volunteer count and box labels for the church pantry team.

attributes.subject: Your monthly subscription invoice is ready
attributes.body: Your April subscription invoice is now available in the account billing portal.
